title: fix(deployer): use export * for workspace packages to fix missing transitive exports

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: fix(deployer): Fix monorepo workspace dependency resolution

summary: Fixes a runtime crash during `mastra dev` where workspace packages with transitive exports (e.g. InMemoryStore from @mastra/core/storage referenced via shared rollup chunks) are missed by static analysis. The fix emits `export * from 'pkg'` for workspace packages in the virtual dependency cache instead of explicit named exports, ensuring all named exports are available. Non-workspace (third-party) packages retain the existing named-export optimization for tree-shaking. Two existing unit tests are updated to match the new behavior.
maintainerNotes: High-quality community contribution. The fix is well-scoped (2 files, only touches bundleExternals logic), has a clear problem description with a concrete reproduction scenario, and updates existing tests. The approach is sound: workspace packages don't need tree-shaking optimization since they're local, so `export *` is safe and avoids the transitive export gap. Missing a changeset — maintainer should request one or add it before merge. CI test suites are stuck in PENDING (likely needs approval to run for external contributor). The `isWorkspace` property is already part of the existing type/interface, so no new plumbing was needed.
